color_map: red = Low to moderate drinking (group_1); blue = Non-drinking (group_0), per the panel c legend
notes: Panel c LEfSe LDA bar chart (LDA score log10, threshold 2.0) lists all taxa with the group they are enriched in via bar color/side. Red bars (negative LDA axis) = enriched in Low-to-moderate drinking group (group_1) = increased; blue bars (positive LDA axis) = enriched in Non-drinking group (group_0) = decreased relative to group_1. Panel d cladogram shows the same taxa/coloring but was not used for extraction since panel c gives explicit taxon names. Panels a/b (stacked composition bar charts at family/genus level) and were ignored per instructions.
